---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Nav3Kit
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that Nav3Kit makes hard or impossible today? Describe the use case, not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it touches the public API (`Router`, `AppHostNav`, `ResultKey`, `EntryProviderInstaller`), sketch what it would look like:

```kotlin
// example usage
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you tried or thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope

- [ ] This is a backwards-compatible addition
- [ ] This changes existing public API (breaking)
- [ ] This is DI-framework agnostic (works for both Hilt and Koin)

## Additional context

Links, prior art from other navigation libraries, related issues, etc.
